commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 24:17 Now after the death of Jehoiada came the princes of Judah, and bowed before the king. Then the king hearkened unto them. Hebrew, "bowed down to the king, and he hearkened to them. "(Haydock) The Jews say that the princes flattered him with the title of god, as he had been educated in the temple. (Estius) But this is improbable. (Calmet) They petitioned for leave to re-establish the worship of Baal, (Menochius) and paid greater honours to the king than were becoming.
